examples: Africa must develop its vast resources to tackle poverty and underdevelopment.
Underdevelopment is chocking: the squalor, disease, unnecessary deaths, and hopelessness of it all!
This Pacific Rim civilization being created is a new relationship between development and underdevelopment.
With their history of poverty and underdevelopment, Southern states are motivated to be business friendly.
Famine, international debt, underdevelopment, war and pandemics all make the right to healthcare difficult to provide.
